rationale: Crypto trading signal monitor docs and config improvements: adds .gitignore (state file, __pycache__), expands README with monitoring instructions (cron and loop modes, Telegram commands /confirm /close /status, state-file env var), and substantially expands docs/STRATEGIES.md with the full 21-strategy Minara/TradingView table including TF, core logic, and TV script links. The error-swallow detector likely fired on a try/except in the monitor script's Binance API fallback (data-api.binance.vision fallback path is mentioned in the README, implying try/except network-error handling). Defensible fallback idiom, not a real error swallow. Mostly documentation update.
